LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANYA FUCHS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED IN PART. THE CASE WILL BE TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THAT RELIEF. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS DENIED BECAUSE DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL GAVE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL INSUFFICIENT TIME TO RESPOND TO THE APRIL 12 LETTER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANYA FUCHS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.
Appearances: unidentified counsel appearing to have an order signed; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted in part. The case will be transferred to Alameda County. Plaintiff does not oppose that relief. The request for attorney's fees is denied because defendant's counsel gave plaintiff's counsel insufficient time to respond to the April 12 letter. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
